message:
fix(ops): emit structured lab events and use proportional loss adjustment in mitigation synthesis

IncidentLab now records LabEvent entries for each workflow step
(load_trace, synthesize_mitigation, compare_replay, promote_mitigation)
instead of discarding event codes to let _. Events accumulated via
bounded push_bounded helper (cap 4096).

Loss adjustment for mitigation synthesis now scales proportionally
with net policy shift (clamped to +/-100 per decision) instead of
fixed +/-5 based on signum, providing more accurate loss tracking.

All methods changed from &self to &mut self to support event
accumulation. Tests updated to verify event counts and codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
